title: German Fromage Gratin
description: A creamy, German-inspired gratin made with a blend of cheeses and a rich, intensely flavored sauce.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly add the white wine, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth.
Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a separate saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and stir in the German gratin spice blend.
Add the sauce to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
